name: finesse-html
description: Edit rendered HTML on the fly while preserving your source.

commands.title: Finesse: Show Cursor Agent Connection Status
Finesse: Show Claude Code Connection Status

finesse.port.markdownDescription: HTTP server port. Use `"auto"` to allocate an ephemeral port, or a specific port number.

finesse.editableElements.description: Override block-container selector list. Empty = use computed defaults.

finesse.templateTokens.description: Regex source patterns marking the whole file as templated. JS template-literal `${...}` interpolations are always handled at the per-text-node level and don't lock the file.

finesse.serverIdleTimeout.description: Milliseconds to keep the preview server alive after the last preview closes.

finesse.reloadDebounceMs.description: Debounce window (ms) for external-edit reload triggers.

finesse.openOnHtmlOpen.description: Automatically open the preview when an HTML file is opened.

finesse.reactDevServerUrl.markdownDescription: React or Next dev server URL to proxy for JSX/TSX previews, for example `http://localhost:5173` or `http://localhost:3000/dashboard`. Use the exact page URL for Next apps, and enable `jsx-loc-plugin` so Finesse can map rendered DOM back to JSX source.

finesse.aiCommand.description: Command id to invoke for "Rewrite with AI" (Phase 3A). Empty = auto-detect at activation.

finesse.agent.cursorModel.description: Cursor model id to use when asking an agent to change the selected element.

finesse.agent.claudeModel.description: Claude model id (e.g. claude-opus-4-8, claude-sonnet-4-6, claude-haiku-4-5, claude-fable-5, or alias 'opus'/'sonnet'/'haiku') used by the Claude Code agent provider. Also changeable from the Ask Agent panel's ⋯ menu.

enumDescriptions: Use the Cursor Agent SDK (requires a Cursor API key).
Use Claude Code via the Claude Agent SDK (uses your local Claude Code subscription if authenticated).
finesse.agent.provider.description: Which agent runs when you press Send in the Ask Agent panel.

scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.iframe.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.webview.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.tests.json --noEmit
